summary: Iteration 20 - Ticket System & Payment Integration Testing Complete. All 17 backend tests passed. Frontend verification complete. All features working as expected: (1) GET /api/credits/balance returns correct {tickets, has_purchased, costs} with proper cost map (Brief Simplifier: 2, Course Planner: 3, Essay Scorer: 2, all others: 1). (2) POST /api/credits/purchase creates Stripe checkout session with real test keys. (3) Ticket deduction verified on decode-jargon, humanise, rubric/simplify endpoints. (4) 402 insufficient tickets error returns 'You're out of tickets' message. (5) Credits page shows all 4 packs with correct prices, save badges, and 'Grab these tickets →' buttons. (6) Nav bar shows 🎫 icon before ticket count. (7) All tool pages show TicketCostBar with cost and balance. (8) Study Buddy shows lock icon and 'Buy any ticket pack to unlock your Study Buddy' for free tier users. (9) Landing page shows '3 Welcome Tickets on signup'. (10) Value comparison section visible below ticket packs.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 20 complete. Full ticket system and payment integration verified. Backend: GET /api/credits/balance returns {tickets, has_purchased, costs} with correct cost map. POST /api/credits/purchase creates Stripe checkout session. Ticket deduction works on all tool endpoints. 402 error with 'out of tickets' message when insufficient. Frontend: Credits page shows 4 packs (Starter $14.99/10, Standard $38.99/30, Semester $89.99/75, Power $219.99/200 AUD) with save badges and 'Grab these tickets →' buttons. Nav bar shows 🎫 icon. All tool pages show TicketCostBar. Study Buddy locked for free tier with 'Buy any ticket pack to unlock' message. Landing page shows '3 Welcome Tickets on signup'. Test user: test@simplifii.com / test123 with 3 tickets and has_purchased=false.
